ddls:
CREATE TABLE "drug_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drug interaction */,
  "drug_a_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the first drug in the interaction */,
  "drug_b_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the second drug in the interaction */,
  "level" TEXT /* Severity level of the drug interaction (e.g., Minor, Major) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the interaction */,
  "alternative_therapy" TEXT /* Recommendations for alternative therapies */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Doctor who created the interaction record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the interaction record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the interaction record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drug_interactions_drug_a_id FOREIGN KEY ("drug_a_id") REFERENCES drugs ("drug_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drug_interactions_level FOREIGN KEY ("level") REFERENCES interaction_levels ("level_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drug_interactions_drug_b_id FOREIGN KEY ("drug_b_id") REFERENCES drugs ("drug_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drugs" (
  "drug_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the drug */,
  "drug_name" TEXT /* Name of the drug */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the drug */,
  "usage_guidelines" TEXT /* Usage guidelines for the drug */,
  "pharmacological_class" TEXT /* Pharmacological class of the drug */,
  "drug_type" TEXT /* Type of the drug (e.g., prescription, OTC) */,
  "contra_indications" TEXT /* Contraindications for the drug */,
  "side_effects" TEXT /* Potential side effects of the drug */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Doctor who created the drug record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the drug record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the drug record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drug_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interaction_levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each severity level */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the severity level (e.g., Minor, Major) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the severity level */,
  "level_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each level (e.g., MINOR, MAJOR) */,
  "level_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of each level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prescriptions" (
  "prescription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prescription */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the patient receiving the prescription */,
  "drug_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the prescribed drug */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage instructions for the drug */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date for the prescription */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date for the prescription */,
  "refills" INTEGER /* Number of refills allowed for the prescription */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* Doctor who prescribed the medication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the prescription record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the prescription record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prescription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prescriptions_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prescriptions_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prescriptions_drug_id FOREIGN KEY ("drug_id") REFERENCES drugs ("drug_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the patient */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the patient */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Allergies of the patient */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the patient record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the patient record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related drug interaction */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient receiving the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was generated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the alert (e.g., acknowledged, unresolved) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message displayed to the doctor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_interaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_id") REFERENCES drug_interactions ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "doctors" (
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each doctor */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the doctor */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the doctor */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty of the doctor */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the doctor */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Hospital ID where the doctor practices */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the doctor record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the doctor record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doctor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "doctor_patient_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., primary care, specialist) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_doctor_patient_relationships_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_doctor_patient_relationships_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id")
)
